videos.headline: Blake Corum powers it into end zone for opening drive TD
videos.description: Blake Corum puts Michigan up 7-0 early as he follows his blockers into the end zone from short yardage.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Corum powers it into end zone for opening drive TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Corum bulldozes into end zone for 2nd TD of the game
videos.description: Blake Corum scores his second touchdown of the game as he follows his offensive line into the end zone from 2 yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Corum bulldozes into end zone for 2nd TD of the game) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: J.J. McCarthy rips one to Roman Wilson for a Michigan TD
videos.description: Michigan gets the touchdown before halftime as J.J. McCarthy finds Roman Wilson from 13 yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (J.J. McCarthy rips one to Roman Wilson for a Michigan TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Roman Wilson speeds away from defense for 47-yard TD
videos.description: J.J. McCarthy and Roman Wilson hook up for a touchdown for the second time today as they score from 47 yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Roman Wilson speeds away from defense for 47-yard TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Corum finds the end zone for the third time
videos.description: Blake Corum scores from the 5-yard line for his third touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Corum finds the end zone for the third time) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
